{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44212", "cvss": {"score": 9.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Impact

This is a **stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS)** vulnerability in the PrestaShop back-office Customer Service view.

An unauthenticated attacker can submit the public Contact Us form with a malicious email address. The payload is stored in the database and executed when a back-office employee opens the affected customer thread, enabling session hijacking and full back-office takeover.

### Patches

Patched in PrestaShop 8.2.6 and 9.1.1.

### Workarounds

None.

### Resources

- Reported by Savio at Doyensec (`anthropic@doyensec.com`) in collaboration with Anthropic Research.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00331, "percentile": 0.24741}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-w9f3-qc75-qgx9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-08T16:54:22Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-w9f3-qc75-qgx9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-w9f3-qc75-qgx9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44212"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-08T16:54:22Z", "references": ["https://github.com/PrestaShop/PrestaShop/security/advisories/GHSA-w9f3-qc75-qgx9", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-w9f3-qc75-qgx9"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/PrestaShop/PrestaShop/security-advisories/GHSA-w9f3-qc75-qgx9", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/PrestaShop/PrestaShop", "summary": "PrestaShop has a stored XSS executable in customer service view", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T16:54:23Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-w9f3-qc75-qgx9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "8.2.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "prestashop/prestashop"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 8.2.6"}, {"first_patched_version": "9.1.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "prestashop/prestashop"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 9.0.0, < 9.1.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: PrestaShop has a stored XSS executable in customer service view
